info.title: ODay Plus Assisted Listing Intake API
info.description:
Normative API contract for ODP-SD-INTAKE-001. High-impact mutations are
non-optimistic, require Idempotency-Key and If-Match where stated, and
return durable decision/job/audit receipts.

tags.name: Intake
tags.description: Submit, inspect, cancel, quarantine, and reopen assisted listing intakes.

tags.name: ListingInbox
tags.description: Query the tenant-scoped assisted listing intake inbox.

tags.name: Corrections
tags.description: Propose and apply attributable field corrections.

tags.name: Identity
tags.description: Review and execute reversible property identity decisions.

tags.name: Assignment
tags.description: Assign, claim, transfer, complete, pause, and resume workflow ownership and SLA.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Inspect and retry durable asynchronous jobs from valid checkpoints.

tags.name: Promotion
tags.description: Request, independently review, and execute candidate-site promotion.

tags.name: SavedViews
tags.description: Store and retrieve actor- or tenant-scoped inbox views.

200.description: Stable, tenant-scoped page. Cursor is opaque base64url JSON signed by the server and expires after 24 hours.
Idempotent replay of a prior accepted response.

207.description: Per-row partial-success receipt. A row is an independent intake and may be accepted or rejected without rolling back other rows.

202.description: Entire batch accepted for asynchronous validation.

413.description: Batch exceeds 1000 rows or configured byte limit.

post.summary: Submit a manual CSV or approved-feed batch

200.description: Authorized intake detail with authoritative version, effective values, processing history, and audit references.

201.description: Correction proposal or application was durably committed and an auditable receipt is returned.
Match decision proposal was durably created and routed according to the independent-review policy.

202.description: Approved decision accepted for serializable execution

post.summary: Propose or execute a property merge
Propose or execute a property split
Propose or execute an identity unmerge

200.description: Assignment was committed with a new aggregate version and authoritative due time.

202.description: Replay queued from a durable checkpoint

post.summary: Retry a job from a durable checkpoint

get.summary: Get the authoritative durable job receipt

200.description: Views owned by the actor or shared to the actor's tenant/role

get.summary: Get the latest intake promotion decision

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque signed base64url token containing contract version, tenant, sort tuple, last resource ID, and expiry. Clients must not construct or modify it.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Scoped to tenant, actor, operation; retained 72 hours for normal mutations and 30 days for identity/promotion decisions.

IdempotencyReplayed.description: true when the response was replayed from a prior durable receipt

InvalidCursor.description: Cursor invalid, expired, wrong tenant, or wrong query fingerprint.

Forbidden.description: Backend policy denied the action or masked all required fields.

NotFound.description: Resource not found within authorized scope.

VersionConflict.description: Aggregate version, workflow state, assignment owner, or dependent identity version changed.

IdempotencyConflict.description: Idempotency key already exists with a different request fingerprint.

example.message: Key was already used for a different request

ValidationError.description: Request, row, field, state, or policy validation failed.

PreconditionRequired.description: If-Match is required for this mutation.

PromotionRequestAccepted.description: Promotion request persisted and routed for validation or independent review; no candidate is implied.

PromotionExecutionAccepted.description: Approved review committed and candidate creation execution queued.

DecisionOk.description: Current decision state or synchronously committed review result.

DecisionExecutionAccepted.description: Approved decision execution or reversal queued.

RateLimited.description: Tenant, actor, source, or endpoint rate limit exceeded.

Backpressure.description: Durable write or queue capacity is under protection; no request was accepted without a receipt.

occurred_at.description: Authoritative server timestamp for the error response.

next_action.description: Machine-readable client guidance; null when no safe automated action exists.
